name: Museu de Menorca
description: The island's leading museum, set in the former Franciscan friary of Sant Francesc (18th c.), with a beautiful Baroque cloister. The best thread for understanding Menorca, from Talayotic prehistory to the British legacy, before heading out to explore it.

highlights: walk through the largest archaeological collection on the island (more than 36,000 pieces), from the Talayotic culture to the Islamic period
stroll the Baroque cloister of the former friary of Sant Francesc
put the taulas and settlements in context before visiting them on the ground
